def.name: Therapies indicating end of life care

a:s.a:s: valueset "Therapies indicating end of life care": 'http://fhir.org/guides/cdc/opioid-cds/ValueSet/therapies-indicating-end-of-life-care'

def.name: Conditions likely terminal for opioid prescribing

a:s.a:s: valueset "Conditions likely terminal for opioid prescribing": 'http://fhir.org/guides/cdc/opioid-cds/ValueSet/conditions-likely-terminal-for-opioid-prescribing'
/* Existing sets for first six recs */ valueset "Opioid misuse assessment procedure": 'http://fhir.org/guides/cdc/opioid-cds/ValueSet/opioid-misuse-assessment-procedure'
// Harvested from VSAC - OID: 2.16.840.1.113762.1.4.1108.15 valueset "Hospice Finding Codes": 'http://fhir.org/guides/cdc/opioid-cds/ValueSet/hospice-finding'

def.name: Opioid analgesics with ambulatory misuse potential

a:s.a:s: // Rx valueset "Opioid analgesics with ambulatory misuse potential": 'http://fhir.org/guides/cdc/opioid-cds/ValueSet/opioid-analgesics-with-ambulatory-misuse-potential'

def.name: Extended release opioid with ambulatory misuse potential

a:s.a:s: valueset "Extended release opioid with ambulatory misuse potential": 'http://fhir.org/guides/cdc/opioid-cds/ValueSet/extended-release-opioid-with-ambulatory-misuse-potential'

def.name: US Core Health Concern Condition Category

a:s.a:s: valueset "US Core Health Concern Condition Category": 'http://fhir.org/guides/cdc/opioid-cds/ValueSet/condition-us-core-health-concern-category'

def.name: Opioid Other Than Synthetic Ordered In Last 12 Months

a:s.a:s:
// TODO: Capture process decisions for long-term opioid use
define "Opioid Other Than Synthetic Ordered In Last 12 Months":
"Can the implementing EHR support queries for past medications by date range?"

condition.name: Can the implementing EHR support queries for past medications by date range?

valueset.name: Opioid analgesics with ambulatory misuse potential

a:s.a:s: define function "Get Active Ambulatory Medication Requests" (value List<MedicationRequest>) returns List<MedicationRequest>:
define function "Get MedicationRequest Medication as Code"(value List<MedicationRequest>):
"Can the implementing EHR support queries for past medications by date range?"

condition.name: Can the implementing EHR support queries for past medications by date range?

valueset.name: Opioid analgesics with ambulatory misuse potential

a:s.a:s: "Can the implementing EHR support queries for past medications by date range?"

condition.name: Can the implementing EHR support queries for past medications by date range?

a:s.a:s: define "Active Ambulatory Benzodiazepine or CNS Depressant Rx":
"Can the implementing EHR support queries for past medications by date range?"

a:s.a:s: "Can the implementing EHR support queries for past medications by date range?"

condition.name: Can the implementing EHR support queries for past medications by date range?

def.name: Is Opioid Analgesic with Ambulatory Misuse Potential?

a:s.a:s: define function "Is Opioid Analgesic with Ambulatory Misuse Potential?"(value List<MedicationRequest>):

valueset.name: Opioid analgesics with ambulatory misuse potential

a:s.a:s: define function "Is Benzodiazepine or CNS Depressant?"(value List<MedicationRequest>):

codes.name: US Core Health Concern Condition Category

def.name: Conditions Indicating End of Life or With Limited Life Expectancy

a:s.a:s: define "Conditions Indicating End of Life or With Limited Life Expectancy":

valueset.name: Conditions likely terminal for opioid prescribing

a:s.a:s: define "End of Life Assessment": // 1. Conditions indicating end of life or with limited life expectancy
"Conditions Indicating End of Life or With Limited Life Expectancy"

operand.name: Conditions Indicating End of Life or With Limited Life Expectancy

a:s.a:s: define function "Days on Opioids during Period"(period Interval<Date>):

codes.name: Opioid analgesics with ambulatory misuse potential

valueset.name: Opioid analgesics with ambulatory misuse potential

def.name: Prescribed Opioids for 21 or more of 30 Days for each of the past 3 Months

a:s.a:s: define "Prescribed Opioids for 21 or more of 30 Days for each of the past 3 Months":
Coalesce( // If there are timing events, take the latest.
, // Otherwise, if there's a Period, use its start.
/* * Conversion Functions */ define function CodeableConceptsToString(concepts List<FHIR.CodeableConcept>):

operand.name: Age Less than 18 Years Is Enabled

condition.name: Age Less than 18 Years Is Enabled

expression.value:
<style>
  .alert-body {
    width: 670px;
    font-family: segoe-ui, sans-serif;
    background-color: #FEFFF1;
  }

  .details-table {
    border-collapse:collapse;
    border-style: ridge;
    background-color: #FEFFF1;
    padding: 2px;
  }

  .details-caption {
    border-style: ridge;
    border-bottom: none;
    background-color: #FEFFF1;
    padding: 2px;
  }

  .details-table-header {
    border-style: ridge;
    padding: 5px;
  }

  .details-table-cell {
    border-style: ridge;
    padding: 5px;
  }

  .details-table-footer-cell {
    border-style: ridge;
    padding: 5px;
    font-size: small;
  }

  .details-table-cell-unexpected {
    border-style: ridge;
    padding: 5px;
    color: red;
    font-weight: bold;
  }

  .more-text {
    position: relative;
    margin-bottom: 2em;
  }
  
  .more {
    display:none;
  }

  .show-more:checked + .more {
    display:block;
  }
</style>
